name: Research Co-Scientist
description: A mixed deterministic and autonomous research co-scientist with one isolated OpenShell worker and explicit evidence and human-review boundaries.
llm_role: Multi-agent research team for topic framing, evidence evaluation, hypothesis critique, experiment planning, and drafting.
agent_responsibilities: frame a research goal and expose assumptions
retrieve and evaluate local and public evidence
generate falsifiable hypotheses and competing explanations
design review-only experiment, code, benchmark, and analysis plans
draft and meta-review a source-grounded research brief

actions.name: gather_more_evidence
actions.description: Request targeted evidence before ranking a hypothesis.

actions.name: revise_hypothesis
actions.description: Revise a candidate after an evidence-grounded critique.

actions.name: review_research_packet
actions.description: Prepare the packet for qualified human review.

default_inputs.research_goal: Identify testable, non-clinical strategies for reducing energy use in a small data-center cooling loop.
default_inputs.research_question: Which controllable cooling-loop interventions are most plausible to test first, and what evidence would distinguish them?
default_inputs.scope: Desk research and experiment planning only; no live system changes.
